name: CyberPower Smart App Sinewave PR3000RT2UCN 3000VA/3000W Rack/Tower UPS System - Sine Wave - 8x NEMA 5-20R - 1x NEMA L5-30R - Built-in Cloud Monitoring - Pre-installed RMCARD206 Network Management Card - EPO & USB & Serial Management Ports (PR3000RT2UCN)
shortName: CyberPower Smart App Sinewave PR3000RT2UCN 3000VA/3000W Rack/Tower
